creator: contact@simplerezo.com
text: Category: Internet Service proviers and/or Consulting services SimpleRezo, a French Company, provides web hosting solutions based exclusively on FreeBSD and opensource technologies (jails or dedicated servers, apache, php, tomcat, mySQL, pgSQL...). Others services includes: network architecture consulting (fail-over, high avaibility...), FreeBSD servers administration or support (fileservers, firewalls, mailservers...)... You can reach us at http://www.simplerezo.com/nous-contacter.php.
